backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Urban Thekedaar backend, handling user profiles, query/contact form submissions, and construction estimate calculations with role-based access control via AccessControl and MixinAuthorization modules.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two implemented features — anonymous form submissions for public-facing components and Hero section tagline styling — to their relevant files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summary document describing the purpose and recent changes of each frontend source file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, including colors for background, foreground, primary, chart, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Urban Thekedaar React app, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing scroll-based section navigation, admin panel toggling, Internet Identity authentication state, and conditional rendering of ProfileSetup and AdminPanel views.
frontend/src/components/AboutUs.tsx: About Us section component displaying a company description for Urban Thekedaar and four principle cards (Live Project Tracking, Fair Pricing, On-Time Delivery, Build Quality) with Lucide icons.
frontend/src/components/AdminInquiries.t: A React component that displays all submitted contact form inquiries in a card list, visible only to admin users, with loading skeletons and empty/error states.
frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx: A tabbed admin dashboard component that shows query forms, contact forms, and calculator leads in card layouts, with authentication via Internet Identity and logout support.
frontend/src/components/Chatbot.tsx: A floating chatbot widget with FAQ keyword matching and a query submission form, supporting quick replies and a multi-step lead capture flow.
frontend/src/components/Contact.tsx: A contact section with a form for name, email, phone, service type, and message that submits to the backend via a mutation hook, alongside static contact info cards.
frontend/src/components/EstimateCalculat: A multi-step construction cost estimate calculator that collects project details and address, submits to the backend, and displays a formatted cost breakdown result.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: A simple footer component displaying copyright, contact info, and a branded link to caffeine.ai.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Fixed top navigation header with the Urban Thekedaar logo, desktop nav buttons, and a mobile slide-out sheet menu; conditionally shows an 'Inquiries' link for authenticated admins.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a background construction image, overlay, tagline text, and two CTA buttons linking to the contact and calculator sections.
frontend/src/components/HowWeWork.tsx: Section displaying four engagement model cards (Fixed Price, Commission, Collaborations, Turnkey) with icons, badges, descriptions, and highlight bullet points.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Button component that handles Internet Identity login/logout, showing a spinner during authentication and clearing the React Query cache on logout.
frontend/src/components/OurFounder.tsx: Section profiling founder Pulkit Hans with a bio, avatar banner, and a grid of emphasis points highlighting the company's engineering and quality standards.
frontend/src/components/Process.tsx: Section presenting the four-step construction process (Site Assessment, Planning, Execution, Handover) as cards with icons, step numbers, and connecting arrows.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: Modal dialog that prompts a newly authenticated user to enter their name and optional email, then saves the profile via the useSaveCallerUserProfile mutation.
frontend/src/components/Testimonials.tsx: Renders a responsive grid of six client testimonials with star ratings, reviewer name, location, and project type for the Urban Thekedaar construction service.
frontend/src/components/WhyUs.tsx: Displays a 'Why Choose Urban Thekedaar' section with six feature cards (engineering, tracking, technology, workforce, transparency, delivery) and a promotional promise banner.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via a React context and custom hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for backend interactions including user profiles, admin checks, query forms, contact forms, and calculator leads/estimates.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Inter and Poppins fonts, defines a warm earth-tone CSS custom property palette (light and dark modes), and sets base typography and utility styles via Tailwind.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider into the DOM root.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with helpers to persist, retrieve, and clear those values via sessionStorage.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining dark mode, custom color tokens using oklch variables, typography/container-query/animate plugins, and custom font families and keyframe animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the current state of the 'urbantheekedaar' construction project, recording existing features, pending feature requests, architectural notes, and schema versioning metadata.
